prompt: An endless tropical rainforest canopy stretching to the horizon, a winding muddy brown river cutting through the dense green jungle, misty tropical atmosphere, and bright sunlight filtering through scattered clouds. Higher up, the canopy recedes and the river network becomes a branching pattern among unbroken green expanse. Lower down closer to the treetops, individual emergent trees with large crowns, colorful macaws in flight, and a thin column of smoke from a riverside settlement become visible. First-person viewer as a helicopter pilot, with the cockpit instrument panel and windshield frame visible at the bottom and sides of the frame. First-person view from the helicopter cockpit, looking forward and slightly downward through the windshield over the jungle canopy.

scene_adherence.visible_part: An endless tropical rainforest canopy stretches to the horizon. A winding muddy brown river cuts through the dense green jungle. Bright sunlight filters through scattered clouds.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: There is a misty tropical atmosphere. Higher up, the canopy recedes and the river network becomes a branching pattern among the unbroken green expanse. Lower down closer to the treetops, individual emergent trees with large crowns, colorful macaws in flight, and a thin column of smoke from a riverside settlement become visible.
